message:
style: formatting fixes and test readability improvements

Minor cleanup pass across three files:

  dataflow.rs: fix closure pattern in topological sort filter
  (|(_, &deg)| → |&(_, &deg)|) for correct reference binding,
  and rename single-letter variables in diamond-glitch test
  (g→graph, s→source, a→add_ten, b→add_hundred, c→combined)
  for improved readability

  pane.rs: rustfmt import reordering (ExitBehavior, impl_downcast)

  tab.rs: rustfmt assertion formatting in compute_split_size test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
